title: Scuba Diving Adventure in Green Island

all.en: Jason had been dreaming about a diving trip ever since he got his open water license.
all.zh: 傑森自從取得開放水域潛水執照後，就一直夢想著一趟潛水旅行。

all.en: He convinced two college friends to spend a long weekend on Green Island in June.
all.zh: 他說服兩位大學朋友在六月時到綠島度過一個長週末。

all.en: They flew from Taipei to Taitung and then took a small ferry across choppy waves.
all.zh: 他們從台北飛到台東，再搭乘一艘小渡輪穿越翻騰的浪濤。

all.en: Ming felt seasick during the ride, but Jason and Wei kept her laughing the whole way.
all.zh: 小銘在航程中暈船，但傑森與威一路逗她開心。

all.en: Green Island appeared on the horizon like a quiet emerald floating in blue silk.
all.zh: 綠島在地平線上現身，宛如一顆漂浮於藍色絲綢上的靜謐翡翠。

all.en: Their hostel owner met them at the harbor with three scooters and a wide grin.
all.zh: 民宿老闆在港口迎接他們，帶著三輛機車和一臉燦爛的笑容。

all.en: They rode along the coastal road as warm sea wind blew through their hair.
all.zh: 他們沿著海岸公路騎行，溫暖的海風在頭髮間吹拂。

all.en: After lunch, they met their diving instructor, a calm woman named Coach Lin.
all.zh: 午餐後，他們見到了潛水教練——一位沉著冷靜的女士，林教練。

all.en: She inspected every regulator, mask, and weight belt with quiet, careful focus.
all.zh: 她仔細檢查每一個調節器、面鏡與配重帶，動作沉穩而專注。

all.en: Their first dive was at Chai Kou, where parrotfish nibbled on bright coral heads.
all.zh: 他們的第一支潛點是柴口，鸚哥魚在鮮豔的珊瑚上啃食。

all.en: Jason felt his ears pop as he descended through clear blue tropical water.
all.zh: 傑森下潛時感覺耳朵隨著清澈的熱帶藍水而砰然鼓動。

all.en: A small school of silver fish circled them like a swirling underwater cloud.
all.zh: 一群銀色小魚像旋轉的水下雲朵般環繞著他們。

all.en: Wei excitedly pointed at a moray eel hiding inside a dark rocky crack.
all.zh: 威興奮地指著一條藏在暗色岩縫中的海鱔。

all.en: Coach Lin signaled everyone to stay calm and keep a respectful distance.
all.zh: 林教練示意大家保持冷靜，並與其保持尊重的距離。

all.en: Back on the boat, they shared warm towels and snacks of dried mango and crackers.
all.zh: 回到船上後，他們共享溫熱的毛巾和芒果乾、餅乾等零食。

all.en: The second dive took them deeper to a wreck covered in soft pink coral.
all.zh: 第二支潛入更深，前往一艘覆滿粉色軟珊瑚的沉船。

all.en: Ming hesitated at the descent line but Coach Lin gently held her hand to guide her.
all.zh: 小銘在下潛繩前猶豫了，林教練溫柔地握住她的手帶領她下去。

all.en: Inside the wreck, they saw a green turtle resting peacefully near a broken window.
all.zh: 在沉船內部，他們看見一隻綠蠵龜在破窗旁靜靜歇息。

all.en: Its eyes seemed wise and ancient, as if it had seen a hundred storms pass by.
all.zh: 牠的眼神彷彿睿智而古老，似乎見過上百場風暴的來去。

all.en: Jason felt strangely small but completely at peace inside the silent blue world.
all.zh: 傑森感到出奇地渺小，卻在這靜謐的藍色世界裡完全安詳。

all.en: That evening, they soaked in the famous seawater hot spring under a star-filled sky.
all.zh: 當晚，他們在星空下泡著著名的海水溫泉。

all.en: Steam rose around them while waves crashed gently against nearby black rocks.
all.zh: 蒸氣在四周升起，海浪輕柔地拍打附近的黑色岩石。

all.en: An elderly couple from Tainan shared stories about diving on the island decades ago.
all.zh: 一對來自台南的老夫婦分享了幾十年前在島上潛水的故事。

all.en: They said the coral had been brighter and the fish more plentiful in those years.
all.zh: 他們說那些年的珊瑚更明亮，魚群也更豐富。

all.en: Jason felt a small ache of worry about the changing health of the ocean.
all.zh: 傑森對海洋日漸變化的健康狀況感到一絲淡淡的憂慮。

all.en: The next morning, they joined a beach cleanup organized by a local diving school.
all.zh: 隔天早上，他們參加了當地潛水學校舉辦的淨灘活動。

all.en: They collected plastic bottles, fishing nets, and tiny shards of forgotten foam.
all.zh: 他們撿起塑膠瓶、漁網與被遺忘的小塊保麗龍碎片。

all.en: Coach Lin reminded them that protecting the reef was part of being a diver.
all.zh: 林教練提醒他們，保護珊瑚礁也是身為潛水員的責任之一。

all.en: Their last dive was at sunset, when the water turned a deep golden color.
all.zh: 他們的最後一支潛水在日落時分，海水染上深深的金黃色。

all.en: Jason watched a flying gurnard spread its wing-like fins along the sandy bottom.
all.zh: 傑森看見一條飛角魚在沙底展開像翅膀般的胸鰭。

all.en: When they surfaced, the sky was streaked with orange, pink, and soft purple light.
all.zh: 當他們浮出水面時，天空染上橘色、粉紅與柔和的紫光。

all.en: On the ferry back to Taitung, the three friends sat quietly watching the island shrink.
all.zh: 回台東的渡輪上，三個朋友靜靜坐著看綠島逐漸縮小。

all.en: Ming said she wanted to earn her advanced license before the next summer arrived.
all.zh: 小銘說她想在明年夏天到來前考到進階潛水執照。

all.en: Wei suggested they save up and travel to dive in Palau the following year.
all.zh: 威建議他們存錢，隔年到帛琉去潛水。

all.en: Jason simply nodded, already imagining the next ocean he would step into.
all.zh: 傑森只是默默點頭，腦中已經想像著下一片他將踏入的海洋。

all.en: Back home in Taipei, Jason enrolled in an advanced rescue diver course at a local pool.
all.zh: 回到台北後，傑森在當地的泳池報名了進階救援潛水員的課程。

all.en: Every Saturday morning he practiced towing tired divers and managing surface emergencies.
all.zh: 每個週六早上他都在練習拖帶疲累的潛水員以及處理水面緊急狀況。

all.en: Ming volunteered at a marine education center on weekends to learn about coral restoration.
all.zh: 小銘在週末到一間海洋教育中心當志工，學習關於珊瑚復育的知識。

all.en: Wei started a small social account that shared photos and ocean conservation tips weekly.
all.zh: 威開設了一個小型社群帳號，每週分享照片與海洋保育的小技巧。

all.en: Their three accounts together attracted a steady following of curious young divers.
all.zh: 他們三個帳號合起來吸引了一群穩定追蹤的好奇年輕潛水愛好者。

all.en: By autumn, they were planning a fundraising dive to support reef cleanup along the east coast.
all.zh: 到了秋天，他們已經在規劃一場募款潛水活動，以支援東海岸的珊瑚礁清潔工作。

all.en: Coach Lin agreed to be their lead instructor and offered her boat at a reduced rate.
all.zh: 林教練同意擔任他們的領隊教練，並以優惠的價格出借自己的船。

all.en: Twenty divers signed up within the first two weeks of opening online registration.
all.zh: 線上報名開放的前兩週就有二十位潛水員報名參加。

all.en: Jason felt proud, but also slightly nervous about organizing his first large event.
all.zh: 傑森感到驕傲，但對於籌辦自己第一次大型活動也略感緊張。

all.en: Ming reminded him that being underwater had already taught them how to stay calm.
all.zh: 小銘提醒他，潛入水中已經教會了他們如何保持冷靜。
